description_long: This is a large, cylindrical black metal bucket with a matching black lid that fits snugly on top, giving it a sealed appearance. The bucket features a metal wire bail handle attached to circular side mounts, allowing for easy carrying and maneuvering. The surface of the bucket is slightly worn, with subtle scuff marks and a matte-to-glossy finish, suggesting it has seen some use. There are two visible reinforcement bands encircling the body, one near the top and one at mid-height, providing structural strength. The bucket has no visible labels, text, or markings, maintaining a utilitarian and industrial look. Its size and robust construction make it suitable for holding liquids or materials in urban, industrial, or maintenance settings.
description: A large black metal bucket with a fitted lid, wire bail handle, and subtle reinforcement bands, designed for industrial or urban use.
description_view_0: The bucket is viewed from above, showing the smooth, glossy black lid and the circular rim.
description_view_1: This side view highlights one of the circular handle mounts and the wire bail handle resting against the bucket.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full wire bail handle extended outward and both handle mounts visible.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, with the handle mount and wire handle visible on the opposite side.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal reinforcement bands at top and midsection
